title: Stars Arena - REKT
relevance_summary: Reentrancy attack on an unverified contract with compromised validator signatures

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls sellShares() if the contract has known reentrancy vulnerabilities

red_flags: leaving system wide open to DDOS
monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT CALLS sellShares() IF THE CONTRACT HAS KNOWN REENTRANCY VULNERABILITIES
summary: Stars Arena, an Avalanche-based FriendTech clone, suffered a $2.9M loss due to a reentrancy attack on an unverified contract. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring calls to sellShares() and checking for known reentrancy vulnerabilities.
